programme.title: Magnum P.I.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Magnum investigates the murder of a man who, pre-death, hires Thomas to find his killer; Kumu reconnects with an old friend.

programme.title: Magnum
programme.desc: After Magnum is kidnapped, he discovers that his ex is on the island and plans to steal a fortune in gold.

programme.title: Magnum
programme.desc: Magnum is hired by a woman to prove that her son didn't kill his girlfriend and has only 24 hours before the accused accepts a plea deal; Rick and TC try to recover stolen appliances that were donated to a wounded veteran.

programme.title: Magnum
programme.desc: Magnum tries to catch a killer, who may be praying on wealthy men, by posing as a doctor on the same dating app that a murder victim was using.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: When the Dobermans dig up what appears to be a human bone, Magnum and Higgins help Katsumoto investigate the murder of his former mentor.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: When Magnum and Higgins get "yacht-jacked," Higgins gets shot, and she and Magnum are stranded at sea, struggling to reach land before she bleeds out and the culprits return to finish them off.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Magnum's ex shows up at his home with a gunshot wound, wanting his help to find her missing CIA father whose life is in danger; Magnum makes an earnest proposition to Higgins for her to become his private investigations partner.

programme.title: Buried
programme.desc: Paul Conroy wakes up six feet underground and has only ninety minutes to be rescued.

programme.title: Wrecked
programme.desc: A man wakes in a car wreck at the bottom of a ravine and must overcome incredible odds to survive.

programme.title: Jungle
programme.desc: A group of friends trek into the Bolivian jungle. They soon realize that the jungle is a difficult place to be

programme.title: Beyond the Reach
programme.desc: In the desert, a naked guide runs from a hunter who wants to ensure his silence in the death of an old man.

programme.title: Homeboy [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Though only in his 20s, professional boxer Johnny Walker is on the downswing of his career and suffering from a mild form of brain damage. Resettling in the beachfront resort of Asbury Park, N.J., he falls in with shady promoter Wesley Pendergrass and meets kindhearted boardwalk operator Ruby. When Wesley proposes cutting Johnny in on a criminal undertaking, Johnny must choose between a life of crime and a settled future with Ruby.

programme.title: Mercenary for Justice
programme.desc: As a mercenary, John Seeger (Steven Seagal) has a reputation that precedes him. That's why he's being blackmailed into performing a risky job: breaking the son of a wealthy arms dealer out of a South African prison. With his friends taken hostage, Seeger agrees to do the deed -- but finds out too late that he's been double-crossed. Not one who likes being taken for a fool, Seeger hatches an elaborate plan to get even that will make the prison break look like capture the flag.

programme.title: Direct Contact
programme.desc: An American prisoner in a Russian jail is given a chance at freedom if he can rescue a kidnapped woman.

programme.title: My Mom's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: After several years away, FBI agent Henry Durand (Colin Hanks) returns to find his mother, Marty (Meg Ryan), a much different person: Having long mourned for Henry's father, she is now embracing single life. One day, while Marty, Henry and his new fiancée, Emily (Selma Blair), are out for a walk, they meet Tommy (Antonio Banderas), a mysterious stranger, with whom Marty then becomes involved. However, through his FBI contacts, Henry learns that Tommy is suspected of being an art thief.

programme.title: Thrill Seekers
programme.desc: When intrepid reporter Tom Merrick discovers that the same man appears in photographs of major disasters over a hundred-year period, he embarks on an incredible action-filled race against time to prevent a series of new disasters.

programme.title: K-19: The Widowmaker
programme.desc: When Russia's first nuclear submarine malfunctions on its maiden voyage, the crew must race to save the ship.

programme.title: Security
programme.desc: A security guard protects an eleven year-old girl who is being targeted by a gang for participating

programme.title: Timecop
programme.desc: An officer for a security agency that regulates time travel, must fend for his life against a shady politician

programme.title: Point Break
programme.desc: An F.B.I. Agent goes undercover to catch a gang of surfers who may be bank robbers

programme.title: Straw Dogs
programme.desc: In a rural town, a young couple (James Marsden and Kate Bosworth) fights for survival when they re marked for death by depraved locals led by a ruthless predator (Alexander Skarsgård).

programme.title: Vacancy
programme.desc: A late night detour leads to an unimaginable nightmare when an estranged couple’s car breaks down on a remote country road. Finding themselves stranded on a dark and deserted two-lane highway, David Fox and his soon-to-be ex-wife Amy are forced to spend the night at a seedy motel run by an odd but seemingly harmless proprietor. In their filthy, threadbare room, the bickering couple finds a cache of homemade slasher films that look disturbingly real. Once they realize the blood-soaked videos were shot in the very room in which they’re staying, David and Amy know they will be the sadistic filmmakers’ next victims unless they put aside their differences and work together to escape.

programme.title: The Monuments Men
programme.desc: In the midst of WWII a small group of art experts are commissioned by roosevelt as soldiers and sent to the european theater to protect historically important buildings and monuments, and to locate vast troves of priceless art looted by the nazis. Discovering art in castles and mines, they race against time as the nazis scramble to destroy everything they can.

programme.title: Premium Rush
programme.desc: A bike messenger is about to get more than even he is used to when his last envelope of the day - a routine "premium rush" run - turns into a life or death chase through the streets of Manhattan.

programme.title: The Cockleshell Heroes
programme.desc: Two British Royal Marine officers lead a daring commando raid on the coast of Nazi-occupied France.

programme.title: A Man For All Seasons
programme.desc: Dramatic depiction of the conflict between Henry VIII and Sir Thomas More. Winner of six Oscars, including Best Picture (1966), best director (Fred Zinnemann), and best actor (Paul Scofield).

programme.title: Funny Girl
programme.desc: Barbra Streisand s debut film won her the Academy Award for her performance as singer-comediene, Fanny Brice. Nominated for seven other awards, this classic musical film contrasts Fanny s onstage antics with her offstage romance with dashing gambler, Nicky Arnstein (Omar Shariff).

programme.title: Dr. Strangelove Or: How I Learned To Stop Worrying And Love The Bomb
programme.desc: Wickedly dark comedy features Peter Sellers (in three roles) in the midst of impending nuclear war.Co-stars George C. Scott.

programme.title: Gerry
programme.desc: A friendship between two young men is tested when they go for a hike in a desert and forget to bring any water or food with them.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent
programme.desc: A hapless hero tries to stay in front of a glib-tongued spy-master.

programme.title: Monty Python And The Holy Grail
programme.desc: This “cult classic” comedy from the Monty Python team loosely follows the legend of King Arthur.

programme.title: Lancaster Skies
programme.desc: Douglas Miller, a broken, solitary Spitfire ace who survived the Battle of Britain, transfers to Bomber Command, determined to take the war to the skies over Nazi Germany.

programme.title: Rise of the Footsoldier: Part II
programme.desc: Carlton Leach seeks revenge for the murder of three friends by seizing control of the criminal underworld.

programme.title: Green Street Hooligans Underground
programme.desc: An old leader returns to Green Street for revenge after receiving a call that his little brother was killed.

programme.title: Salvable
programme.desc: A boxer struggles to escape the grasp of a small town while battling a broken relationship with his daughter.

programme.title: Southpaw
programme.desc: Boxer Billy Hope turns to a retired fighter to help him turn his life around for one last epic fight.

programme.title: Never Back Down
programme.desc: A rebellious teen starts at a new school, where he becomes caught up in the underground fight scene.

programme.title: Prey of Wrath
programme.desc: An elite special forces operative is sent by Russian Intelligence to hunt down former teammates who have hijacked nuclear warheads.

programme.title: Best Man Dead Man
programme.desc: A bachelor party in the middle of nowhere quickly turns into a night of murder and mystery when the best man ends up with a knife in his head. Everyone is a suspect; only an eccentric private eye in town can solve the mystery.

programme.title: Taken From Rio Bravo
programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: Andromeda: 1883
programme.desc: Space marine Casey Reynolds travels into the past to stop a killer android bent on wiping out the one person crucial to saving the human race.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Assassins of Brotherhood
programme.desc: A secret military organization must ward off a rebellion orchestrated by the Ministry of War.

programme.title: Rising Shaolin: The Protector
programme.desc: A con man finds sanctuary with a monk from the long-lost Shaolin Temple.

programme.title: The Paper Tigers
programme.desc: Three middle-aged men polish their martial arts skills to avenge their fallen master.

programme.title: Hunt the Wicked
programme.desc: Detective Huang Mingjin faces off against criminal mastermind Wei Yunzhou in a city plagued by dark secrets. As police and criminals flood the streets, Huang must unravel the city's sinister core while engaging in a cat-and-mouse game with Wei.

programme.title: KILLER SINGLE DAD
programme.desc: An expectant mother befriends a Good Samaritan who saved her life.

programme.title: The Elizabeth Thomas Story with Elizabeth Smart
programme.desc: Elizabeth Thomas shares new revelations about her ordeal with Elizabeth Smart.

programme.title: To Kill a Stepfather
programme.desc: Nicole learns stepfather Matthew died, mother Kate arrested.

programme.title: Killing Daddy
programme.desc: An unexpected health crisis gives Callie the perfect opportunity to return home.

programme.title: KILLER SINGLE DAD
programme.desc: An expectant mother befriends a Good Samaritan who saved her life.

programme.title: How to Win a Prince
programme.desc: A chronically single dating coach attempts to seduce a prince as she helps him navigate the NYC dating scene.

programme.title: Maria My Love
programme.desc: A young woman named Ana is struggling to deal with her mother's death and her father's mistakes.

programme.title: FBI: Negotiator
programme.desc: An FBI agent must negotiate with a woman holding a hospital hostage in order to get her hands on an experimental drug.

programme.title: Fatal Memories
programme.desc: In this thriller, a woman tries to help her sister recall the events of the fatal stabbing of their mother.

programme.title: Family in Hiding
programme.desc: Single mother witnesses DA's murder, enters protection with her teens, facing a life-altering ordeal.

programme.title: Hard Lesson
programme.desc: A Jewish parole officer, Jeff Solomon White, struggles in his new role as a reading teacher for illiterate teens at a New York high school. Raised by African American parents, White sees the situation differently and is motivated to fight for his students, who face an almost certain life of crime and prison.

programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief recruits a younger crook to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: The Climb
programme.desc: The breath-taking story of two men ... one with a courageous heart who seeks God; the other with an independent spirit who relies on his own strength.

programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief recruits a younger crook to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: Hard Lesson
programme.desc: A Jewish parole officer, Jeff Solomon White, struggles in his new role as a reading teacher for illiterate teens at a New York high school. Raised by African American parents, White sees the situation differently and is motivated to fight for his students, who face an almost certain life of crime and prison.

When the remains of an apartheid-era policeman are discovered 60 years after he went missing, a retired singer revisits her past to help with the investigation. But how much does she know, and what is she holding back?

programme.title: She's Watching
programme.desc: Richard and Zoey have recently moved into their dream home, only to find themselves being watched by an obsessed neighbor. Watching them every night isn't enough to satisfy her urges, so she makes an offer they can't refuse.

programme.title: Guilty Victim
programme.desc: A dangerous investor with a violent past is pulled back into chaos when a home security scheme spirals out of control, forcing him to confront old wounds, betrayal, and a brutal fight to protect what little he has left.

programme.title: Web of Lies
programme.desc: Karmen, a successful businesswoman is secure and thriving in every part of her life, except for love. She downloads a dating app and seems to have found Mr. Right in Jermaine, but her best friends warn her that he might be a scammer. As Karmen falls deeper, she slowly falls victim to a network of lies and deceit, that could cost her life.

programme.title: Gigalow
programme.desc: Diamond White, a college graduate drowning in debt and raising his younger sister, turns to dancing for survival. After moving to Texas, he joins Midnight, an underground male club, and quickly rises to the top. But as money and temptation pull him deeper, Diamond must choose between responsibility and a lifestyle that could cost him everything.

programme.title: 500 MPH Storm
programme.desc: A scientist must get his family to safety before a "hypercane" wipes America off the map.

programme.title: The Land That Time Forgot (2024)
programme.desc: Based on the gripping Science Fiction adventure. Present Day. Survivors of an American military vessel sunk by a Russian sub manage to capture the Russian sub after it surfaces. But now out of fuel, the sub makes its way to a tropical island. As those in the sub explore the island, they realize it is full of previously thought to be extinct creatures like dinosaurs, forcing them to survive the creatures and work together along with those who already live on the island to figure out a way off.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Our Heroes reach their final destination, the "Black Rainbow" drone launch facility.

programme.title: Disaster Strike Force
programme.desc: Plummeting temperatures signify the dawn of a new Ice Age.

programme.title: Killers 2: The Beast
programme.desc: Trapped in an asylum, a woman must escape the demons in her own mind and the killers who want her dead.

programme.title: The Terminators
programme.desc: A small band of resistance fighters battle the cyborgs that have taken control of the planet.

programme.title: The Children
programme.desc: Two maintenance employees of at the Yankee Nuclear Generating plant are conducting an outdoor safety check when they become anxious to leave. Eager to get to the local bar and have a drink, they skip part of the test. Unfortunately a large buildup of pressure causes a yellow toxic gas to leak from one of the pipes. The gas forms into a large cloud that drifts across the ground. Sheriff Billy investigates when a bus load children from the quiet town of Ravensback disappear. He soon discovers a chemical leak nuclear plant at turned them into lethal huggers, and now they are killing residents in the town. Now it is up to him and another resident named John (whose daughter is one of the missing children) to stop them.

programme.title: A Mother's Embrace
programme.desc: A twisted & original new Brazilian horror from Cristian Ponce. In 1996, a young firefighter and her team are called to help an old people’s home that is at risk of flooding during the worst storm to ever hit Rio de Janeiro. As they try their best to evacuate the elderly, the firefighter soon finds that something sinister is lurking beneath the surface, and the residents are not as innocent as they first seemed. Entangled in their web, she must fight through her own traumatic past to escape.

programme.title: Becoming Evil - Serial Killers
programme.desc: There was a golden age of female serial killers in the U.S. and Europe. Female serial killers that targeted their children, husbands, and other family members. This was a time when women were becoming educated but had very little control over their lives. As a result they had very little recourse or legal remedies if they found themselves in a bad marriage or untenable domestic situation, a solution was to 'free themselves' by poisoning their husbands, or anyone controlling their lives and even killing their children.

programme.title: Zombie
programme.desc: In Italy, it was considered the sequel to Dawn Of The Dead. In America, it was called ZOMBIE and advertised with the tag line We Are Going To Eat You! Tisa Farrow, Ian McCulloch, Al Cliver, and Richard Johnson star in this worldwide splatter sensation directed by Maestro Of Gore Lucio Fulci that remains one of the most eye-skewering, skin-ripping, gore-gushingly graphic horror hits of all time!

programme.title: White Zombie
programme.desc: Bela Lugosi gave one of his most classic characterizations as the voodoo master in this minor classic of terror. Here, the horror and supernatural aspects of the plot were not the result of mans imitation of dread superstition. Here, the zombies are true creatures of the dead, under the control of zombie-master Lugosi, a delicious evil sort who weaves his web of evil to ensnare an innocent woman and the plantation owner who covets her for himself, even though she loves another man. The film has been called a terror fairy tale with its heroine clothed in flowing white and Lugosis fiend cloaked in darkness. Enjoyable, at times chilling, White Zombie, despite some moments of over-melodramatic acting, is a fascinating exercise in the macabre, containing some truly classic moments in the genre of the horror film.

programme.title: Speak No Evil
programme.desc: One family accepts an invitation to the rural home of another they met on holiday, only to find their lives altered in unexpected, deeply horrifying ways.

programme.title: Saloum
programme.desc: 2003, three mercenaries extracting a druglord out of Guinea-Bissau are forced to hide in the mystical region of Saloum, Senegal.

programme.title: The Sadness
programme.desc: A young couple trying to reunite amid a city ravaged by a plague that turns its victims into deranged, bloodthirsty sadists.

programme.title: Hunter Hunter
programme.desc: A mysterious predator eludes an aging detective and a cunning outdoorsman to corner and terrorize a woman and daughter trapped in a remote forest cabin.

programme.title: Infested
programme.desc: Facing an invasion of venomous spiders, residents of a suburb building will have to find their way out to survive.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted" - Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again. Drysdale brings him to the Clampetts' just as Grannie showed Pearl how to use a love potion, so everyone thinks Twombly's interest in Grannie is love.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts in Court" - When a couple who ran into the Clampett's car discover that they're rich, they fake injuries and sue the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Entertain" - Jed arranges a party to get Grannie out of her doldrums and invites the Drysdale. But when Mr. Drysdale's boss comes and wants to meet them for dinner, he wonders if he's going to be sent to an Alaskan bank when his boss finds out he's been lying about Jed and his family being sophisticated.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Becomes a Father" - Mlle. Denise comes back for the birth of her dog's puppies, and to see Jed. They do some "courtin' and sparkin'" Mrs. Drysdale isn't nearly so happy when she finds the puppies share more in common with Duke the bloodhound than Claude the poodle.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts and the Dodgers" - Jed and Jethro go golfing with Leo Durocher, coach of the Los Angeles Dodgers, who wants to recruit Jethro as a pitcher when he sees how well he can throw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Pays His Income Tax" - When an IRS agent gets chased away by Granny, Mr. Drysdale tells him the story of how the Clampetts came to be rich and move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Spring Tonic" - Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million, and Jed's just had his annual dose of Granny's spring tonic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Cuts the Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish, who discovers that Jed's family is possibly the first to come the country. If so they'd be famous worldwide, but does Jed want that?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampetts before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society. But Mrs. Smith-Standish goes to the Clampetts' first and becomes enchanted with their antiques and way of life, even to roping the horrified Mrs. Drysdale into helping do the chores the old-fashioned way.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Becomes a Banker" - Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Buys the Freeway" - Henry Jones shows up at the Clampett's, pretends to be an old friend and tries to sell the family the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park, and the freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Steals a Wife" - Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives, until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdales dog. Meanwhile Mrs. Drysdale has arranged a "marriage" between the dogs, complete with a decorated bedroom.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Plays Solomon" - Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police. When one of the officers takes Pearl out, Granny thinks she got Pearl in trouble and becomes sad and contrite. Meanwhile, the police find her still, and new trouble results.

programme.desc: While Lucas and Mark are traveling across the Mexican desert they encounter a trio of Mexican bandits who demand payment to cross "their" desert.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's old Army pal settles in North Fork with his deaf daughter.

programme.desc: Brady Sutton, former member of the Butch Cassidy gang, returns from years in prison and tries to go straight.

programme.title: Gunfighters
programme.desc: Zane Grey's novel "Twin Sombreros" is the inspiration behind this hard riding dust-up of a Western. Randolph Scott is the fast gun whose purpose is to cut a corrupt cattle baron down to size when the baron selfishly monopolizes the market.

programme.title: Ambush At Tomahawk Gap
programme.desc: Hodiak, Brian, Derek and Teal have just been released from prison. They return to Tomahawk Gap, now a ghost town, to retrieve the money that they stole and was buried by a partner somewhere in the town. While hunting, the Indians attack, and a life and death battle ensues.

programme.title: Last Of The Comanches
programme.desc: After a raid by Comanches, six remaining cavalrymen join a stagecoach and lead it to safety.

programme.title: King Of The Wild Horses
programme.desc: Touching story of the friendship between a boy and a wild horse whose captivating rescues of the boy make for an exciting adventure.

programme.title: Battle Of Rogue River
programme.desc: In 1850 Oregon is trying to gain statehood, but a truce is needed with the Indians.

programme.title: Cowboy And The Prizefighter
programme.desc: Red Ryder takes Steve Stevenson, who has saved his life, to his ranch and gives him a job. Red's aunt, the Duchess, knew Steve's father, who supposedly committed suicide after losing his ranch betting on a prizefight. Steve refuses to believe that his father took his own life, suspecting he was murdered. Red and Little Beaver aid Steve in finding his father killer.

programme.title: The Dawn Rider
programme.desc: John Wayne was still a few years from major stardom when he appeared as John Mason, a man seeking revenge for his fathers murder. Marion Burns stars as Alice, Masons love interest, while Reed Howes stars as Masons friend and rival for Alices affection. When Mason finally tracks down the man responsible for his fathers death, will Ben help, or stand in his way? Produced by Lone Star Pictures, the group behind many of Waynes early films, The Dawn Rider is a stirring yarn about the price of vengeance.

programme.title: Lawless Frontier
programme.desc: John Wayne stars in this vintage western about a man avenging the murder of his parents. Other cast members include frequent Wayne sidekick George 'Gabby Hayes', plus Yakima Canutt, Sheila Terry, and Jack Rockwell. This Paul Malvern Production from director Robert N. Bradbury also features Earl Dwire, one of the great B-movie villains, as Zanti, the ruthless bandit who sets the action in motion.

programme.title: The Legend of the Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Butch Cavendish gang ambushes a group of Texas Rangers, killing all but one. The surviving ranger is nursed back to health by Native American Tonto, and takes on the identity of a masked vigilante, determined to bring all outlaws to justice. Culled from episodes of the popular TV series, this feature is great fun for fans of the Lone Ranger. Starring Clayton Moore and Jay Silverheels.

programme.title: Hoppy Serves a Writ
programme.desc: Sheriff Hopalong Cassidy triumphs again in this lighthearted western romp from Harry Sherman Productions. Good ol' Hoppy (William Boyd) has to leave his beloved Texas to track down some bad guys in Oklahoma. You can bet that the action and suspense will follow Hopalong wherever he goes. Also, look for a number of familiar faces in the ast, including TV's future Superman George Reeves, notorious Hollywood heavy Victor Jory, and in his first credited role, Robert Mitchum! In fact, Mitchum would appear in more of Hoppy's adventures before branching out on his own and becoming one of Hollywood's greatest stars. Also featuring Jan Christy, Forbes Murray, Byron Foulger, Earle Hodgins, and Roy Barcroft. Directed by Goerge Archainbaud.

programme.title: Wagon Trail
programme.desc: The son of Sheriff Clay Hartley, of the frontier town Elder, has gotten into bad company and hangs out with an outlaw gang in which, Collins, owner of the Golden Rule Saloon, is the secret head. Sheriff Hartley suspects him, but has been unable to gather the needed evidence. Collins instructs his gang, including young Hartley, to hold up the stagecoach on its return trip from Missionary Flats and take the cargo of gold dust it is carrying. Sheriff Hartley is notified of the planned holdup by one of his deputies who has been spying on Collins, and organizes a posse. A deputy-sheriff is killed in the ensuing gunfight between the lawmen and the outlaws, but Deputy Joe Larkin, pursues and captures Clay Hartley Jr. The latter is quickly tried and convicted of the killing of the deputy, and sentenced to be hung. Sheriff Hartley has only a few hours to prove his son was not the killer. He enlists the aid of Collins' step-daughter, Joan, who is in love with Hartley's son.

programme.title: Last of the Clintons
programme.desc: Icon of early talking pictures, Harry Carey (Red River), portrays the rugged Trigger Carson, a noble cowboy who infiltrates an outlaw gang in order to expose their rackets. Ordered to kidnap a young girl, his identity is revealed and he is forced to fight his way out of the gang and back to safety. Already 56 by the time he signed on to do this and a series of Westerns for Berke Productions, the stately Carrey (who netted an Oscar nomination four years later) was widely lauded at the time for adding a great deal of maturity and respectability due to his undeniable presence and strong performances.

programme.title: Good for Nothing
programme.desc: While traveling to her uncle's ranch, an Englishwoman is kidnapped by a savage outlaw. However, a dangerous posse mistakes them for partners in crime, and the duo then goes on the run across the frontier to survive.

programme.title: Doc Holliday 3
programme.desc: Doc Holliday retires to Colorado after a long battle with tuberculosis and finds himself in one final adventure to save a young man from ruthless outlaws.

programme.title: Doc Holliday 2
programme.desc: After the OK Coral shootout in Tombstone, Doc Holliday opens a small Faro Saloon in a remote town where he encounters Edward Bailey. When a Faro game goes wrong for Edward, he turns up missing and Doc Holliday finds himself on trial for his murder.

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: For a decade, the white settlers and the Apaches have been engaged in a bloody war with no peaceful end in sight. When a white scout, Tom Jeffords (James Stewart), has a dangerously close but enlightening encounter with the natives, he begins to see the humanity in these enemies. Entering the Apache territory seeking peace, Jeffords forms a friendship with the Apache leader Cochise (Jeff Chandler), although there are people on both sides who resist extending the olive branch.

programme.title: Duct Tape Forever
programme.desc: When an evil land baron's limo falls into a sinkhole outside Possum Lodge, a judge orders the men to pay $10,000 in damages in 10 days or lose their beloved lodge forever. Lodge leader Red Green considers various money-making schemes the men dream up, like selling road kill on the Internet. But it's Harold, Red's nerdy nephew, who comes up with an idea that just might save their wood-smoked bacon: a duct tape sculpture contest in Minneapolis with a $10,000 third-place prize. Before you can say "go for the bronze," Red and Harold are hitching the Possum van to their can't-fail, low-ball entry and heading for trouble. Will Harold get the credit he craves and the girl he deserves (or vice versa)? Is their goose cooked or will it fly?

programme.title: Chewed Up

The crew jokes about Nick's organizing skills and reads fan mail.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Fan Fridge Week wraps up on Friday as Carla Hall transforms leftovers into a decadent Banana Bread French Toast. Using cottage cheese, oat milk, and eggs for a rich custard, she tops the sweet treat with a tart lemonade reduction, fresh berries, and chocolate syrup. The hosts discuss taking the show on the road in a van.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The hosts celebrate their 25th show milestone with guest Chadwick Boyd, who elevates the classic Green Bean Casserole with caramelized onions, fresh beans, and a gruyere drop biscuit topping. While the casserole bakes, the crew debates mashed potato techniques, and Michael shares a hilarious story about how an AI misread his pan wall photo. A fan wins a Caraway pan set.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Chewed Up Compilation #2: BLOOPERS showcases the funniest and most unexpected moments from season four. Clinton accidentally consumes a THC-infused beverage before reading fan mail, Michael passionately debates whether air fryers are just convection ovens and defends wood cutting boards, and Carla reveals her unconventional Christmas card habits. The episode features heated discussions about bagel varieties, seed oils, Instagram fitness culture, and holiday movie preferences. The climax occurs during a butter cookie demonstration when a frozen egg yolk refuses to incorporate and a pastry bag catastrophically fails on camera, turning an otherwise polished cooking segment into comedic chaos.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Guest Danielle Sepsy of The Hungry Gnome joins the kitchen to bake her famous, plush Honey Corn Muffins. As the muffins bake, Clinton and Danielle test Carla and Michael's Long Island accents in a hilarious roleplay game. They also play Chew It or Screw It, share Thanksgiving food disaster stories, and give away a $75 gift card to Danielle's bakery to a fan in Virginia.

programme.title: Chewed Up

programme.title: Chewed Up

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane prepares a dinner party meal for a handful of her closest friends. Diane provides helpful tips to alleviate the stress that comes with planning a dinner party and provides easy recipes that are healthy and delicious. On the menu: Char-Broiled Cabbage "Steaks" with Pomegranate Seeds and Lemon Zest, Whole Baked Fish with Leeks, and Greek Yogurt Panna Cotta.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Greece is a cornucopia of age-old natural superfoods. Diane invites a well-known dietician and together they prepare a healthy meal brimming with Greek superfoods including a Spiced Carrot Soup Three Ways, a Black-Eyed Pea Salad with Dried Figs, Pomegranate, EVOO and Herbs; and a dessert of wheat kernels, Greek honey, nuts, and dried fruits called Varvara.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: With Athens as a backdrop, Diane explores the foods that so many of us have in common regardless of where we are from. Can soba noodles be grecophied? Can a classic spanakopita be a filling for an American baked potato? Diane answers these questions and ventures beyond tradition into the global world, embracing new ingredients, and christens new recipes.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Densely forested mountains, stone-cobbled villages, sheep, and greenery are the stuff of Epirus's mountainous terrain. Diane visits a traditional shepherding family and makes a feta cheese pie baked the way it's been done for centuries: over embers. At home, Diane makes two of her own pies: a Pleated, Buttery Feta Cheese Pie and a Chicken-Phyllo Pie, both inspired by this region.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara dives into Chinese heritage at Chinatowns on either side of the continent. In Vancouver, recipes for appetizers cooked with Chinese tea and Dim Sum made by an opera singing Chinese local. Then – a lesson in making Chinese dumplings. Back at home, Wok Queen Grace Young describes her efforts to preserve New York's Chinatown as she and Sara make a BBQ Pork and Yangchow fried rice.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara follows a trail in the Mississippi Delta that leads straight to where blues is born. She keeps going to some of the richest farmland on earth where space age tractors bring in the harvest. Here they eat what they grow, and she joins the farmers to make an easy rice casserole and Blackened catfish. Later – the mother of all hometown cookbooks – Charleston Receipts

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Holidays are when Sara pulls out the stops when it comes to sweets and desserts. Try her Glazed Pears and shortbread pecan praline, or the surprising twist on potstickers filled with dried plum and apricots. On Ask Sara, tips on blind baking a pie crust. Then a favorite food gift in Sara's family - homemade Chocolate Peppermint Bark.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Chicken or eggs? Sara's got some amazing recipes to make them shine, starting with a chicken paillard, slathered in a compound date butter. Baked Chicken thighs are pointed up with the acid of homemade lemon pickles. Then a French chef shows Sara a simple galette of ham and eggs wrapped in pastry - perfect for breakfast, lunch or dinner.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara's in Barcelona to sip gin and tonics in the shadow of the iconic Sagreda Familia, then joins a food writer to make classic Iberico Pork with Romanesco sauce and Gambas Ajillo. At home, Sara whips up Fideo - Barcelona's take on Paella made with noodles instead of rice.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara's on the Spanish island of Mallorca, where an ancient olive grove tended by sheep is the magical setting for cooking a hunters stew over an open fire. Back home, Sara makes Seafood Gazpacho. On 'Ask Sara', she answers a viewer's questions about Lemons.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Fish is on the menu when Sara joins Greek Chef Maria Loi harborside near Athens to cook lemony, crispy skinned Branzino along with Beet, Beans and Feta Salad and Lemon Potatoes. Then it's off to Athen's Central Market to buy Retsina at a famous tavern for a rooftop mezze party in the shadow of the Acropolis. Back at home, Sara uses canned sardines for a quick and easy pantry taco.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Vegetables
programme.desc: Julia and Jacques prepare artichokes—several ways—including artichoke hearts stuffed with spinach and mushroom Duxelle. Julia demonstrates her secret to ever-green cooked string beans and butter bruised peas. Jacques counters with his aromatic Tomato Provencal.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Pork
programme.desc: A classic of the American table--pork chops and applesauce, is the starting point for three J&J improvisations: aromatic grilled, stuffed pork chops with rosemary, served with a tomato, red onion and avocado salad; loin of pork with sautéed red cabbage and apples, and Pork Tenderloin Medallions with port wine and macerated prunes on a bed of orzo.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Creamy Desserts
programme.desc: Julia dons safety goggles and takes up a blowtorch for this hot dessert show. Delectable Creme Caramel and creme Brulé vie for attention with creamy Chocolate Pot de Creme and Profiteroles with Ice Cream and Mocha Anglaise. This show is deliciously and elegantly decadent.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Comfort Food
programme.desc: Poached chicken, chicken pot pie and rustic apple tart dessert. Julia and Jacques show how simple it is to poach a chicken with vegetables, mushrooms and a little white wine, and then take that poaching liquid and use it with the leftover poached chicken for a flaky crusted chicken pot pie. The same simple pastry Julia makes for the pot pie is perfect base for a rustic apple and dried fruit tart.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: St. Petersburg, Russia: Tony continues his mission with a tour of local working-class specialties. He tries his hand at ice-fishing, drinks a lot of vodka, feasts on Russian foods, eats smoked fish and ends the outing with a dip in the outdoor cold pool.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Los Angeles, CA: New York chef, Anthony Bourdain, descends into the culinary underbelly of his metropolitan nemesis, Los Angeles, where he experiences the trials of celebrity fame and the joys of West Coast cuisine.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony sets out to find the real Singapore, with its multicultural restaurants and food markets. He samples prescription food dishes, explores the Geyland Serai Market, and rides the clean and efficient local subway.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Join Tony on his quest to characterize the perfect bar in New York City. Discover the importance of a maniacal bartender, the proper chemical makeup of drinks, the joys of seedy dive-bars, and the need for late-night snacks.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Morocco (Cities): Tony is invited to experience the culinary heart and distinct walled medinas (districts) of the Moroccan city Fes.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Cambodia: With a friend along for the ride, Tony travels to Phnom Penh, Cambodia, where he explores a food culture that is both pleasing to the palette and slightly frightening.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Anthony travels to Tokyo, where he begins in the Tsujiki market and then is introduced to techniques in preparing edomae sushi. He also learns the diets of Sumo wrestlers.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Portugal: Portuguese cuisine holds a dear place in Tony's culinary heart. Tony travels to Porto, home of the famous Port wine, where he is immediately exposed to the codfish and the almost mythical place it holds in Portuguese cuisine and culture.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Puebla, Mexico: According to Tony, the best line cooks in NYC come from Mexico, so he travels to the Puebla, and enjoys mole sauces, toasted ant eggs, fried worms, and the legendary pulque (a slightly hallucinogenic drink made from cactus sap).

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: New York, NY: Passionate about his city, Tony gives us an intimate tour of the New York City foods he loves - sturgeon and bagels, fluke ceviche, pan-seared foie gras, braised veal cheek, authentic cheese and, of course, a hotdog.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Join Tony on his quest to characterize the perfect bar in New York City. Discover the importance of a maniacal bartender, the proper chemical makeup of drinks, the joys of seedy dive-bars, and the need for late-night snacks.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Rural Japan: Tony decides to look for a more relaxing, traditional Japanese culinary experience in the countryside. Tony travels to an old-style Japanese inn that specializes in kaiseki cuisine, ancient tea ceremony, and local ingredients.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Portugal & Southwest France: Visiting his boss's family farm, Tony helps slaughter and feast on a pig the family has been fattening all year. Then, Tony heads to France to experience the rich delights of a foie gras farm.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: London, England: In London, Tony attempts to dispel the myth that all English food is disgusting and over-boiled. Tony tries Nose to Tail Eating, explores traditional fare at Pie and Mash Shoppes, and then visits a predominantly Indian community.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Known as Brazil's capital of happiness, Salvador da Bahia offers fruitful local markets, and rich Bahian cuisine. Here, Tony takes part in a traditional local ceremony, and experiences the culinary talents of the famous Bahian artist of the kitchen - Chef Dada.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Cambodia: With a friend along for the ride, Tony travels to Phnom Penh, Cambodia, where he explores a food culture that is both pleasing to the palette and slightly frightening.

programme.desc: After a group of drunken trail riders runs amok, Mayor Andrew Hope (Carl Benton Reid) of Wichita, Kan., recruits the intrepid Wyatt Earp (Joel McCrea) to end lawlessness. Armed and ready for anything, the new marshal decides he will end gun violence simply by banning guns. Soon Earp must face crooked rancher Clint Wallace (Walter Sande) and whiskey slinger Doc Black (Edgar Buchanan), vicious locals who like Wichita exactly as it is and don't take kindly to being told what to do.

programme.title: The Outriders
programme.desc: Three Confederate soldiers escape from Union captivity, only to be captured by bandit Keeley -- then spared when he discovers they're fellow Southerners. Keeley forces them to help with his next planned heist: stealing gold from a wagon train led by Don Antonio Chaves. The men insinuate themselves with Chaves in preparation for the robbery, but when Will (Joel McCrea) falls in love with a widow (Arlene Dahl) traveling with Chaves, the three men must decide whether to continue the plan.
